title: GRCz10 genome resource package for Tailseeker 3.1 as of Dec 5, 2016
author: Chang, Hyeshik
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Tailseeker 3.1 is a software suite for profiling RNA poly(A) tails with a high-throughput DNA sequencer. This pre-built resource package contains the genome indices, gene annotations, and gene association databases processed to be used with Tailseeker. The data were built with ENSEMBL GRCz10  (Danio rerio)  as of Dec 5, 2016.
steps_raw: Tailseeker 3.1 is a software suite for profiling RNA poly(A) tails with a high-throughput DNA sequencer. This pre-built resource package contains the genome indices, gene annotations, and gene association databases processed to be used with Tailseeker. The data were built with ENSEMBL GRCz10  (Danio rerio)  as of Dec 5, 2016.
